1032.issue: [W1032] Many "common.news" found in [io-package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.voltoplus/blob/master/io-package.json). Repository builder will truncate at 7 news. Please remove old news.

1054.issue: [W1054] Missing suggested translation into ru,pt,nl,fr,it,es,pl,uk,zh-cn of some "common.news" in [io-package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.voltoplus/blob/master/io-package.json).

2004.issue: [E2004] Versions "0.2.6, 0.2.5, 0.2.4, 0.2.3, 0.2.2" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.voltoplus/blob/master/io-package.json) do not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.voltoplus). Please remove from news section.

3008.issue: [E3008] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": "push" trigger "tags" is missing required pattern(s): v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+, v[0-9]+.[0-9]+.[0-9]+-**

3014.issue: [S3014] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "adapter-tests" should declare "needs: check-and-lint" to run after linting.

3019.issue: [W3019] Workflow "/.github/workflows/test-and-release.yml": job "deploy" step using "ioBroker/testing-action-deploy@v1" has "npm-token" parameter specified. Trusted publishing will not work while "npm-token" is set.

5022.issue: [W5022] Why did you decide not to use i18n support?

8906.issue: [S8906] Some Dependabot entries ("npm", "github-actions") use "schedule: interval: monthly". Consider migrating to random cron schedule ("schedule: interval: cron") for load distribution.

8908.issue: [S8908] Dependabot entry for "npm" has "open-pull-requests-limit: 5". A limit of at least 15 is recommended.
